The file /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp:
     1	#include "SYsULexer.h" // 确保这里的头文件名与您生成的词法分析器匹配
     2	#include <fstream>
     3	#include <iostream>
     4	#include <unordered_map>
     5	
     6	// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
     7	std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
     8	  { "Int", "int" },
     9	  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
    10	  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
    11	  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
    12	  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
    13	  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
    14	  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
    15	  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
    16	  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
    17	  { "Return", "return" },
    18	  { "Semi", "semi" },
    19	  { "EOF", "eof" },
    20	  { "Equal", "equal" },
    21	  { "Plus", "plus" },
    22	  { "Comma", "comma" },
    23	  { "Minus", "minus" },
    24	  { "Multiply", "star" },
    25	  { "Divide", "slash" },
    26	  { "Modulo", "percent" },
    27	  { "Assign", "equal" },
    28	  { "PlusAssign", "plus_equal" },
    29	  { "MinusAssign", "minus_equal" },
    30	  { "MulAssign", "star_equal" },
    31	  { "DivAssign", "slash_equal" },
    32	  { "ModAssign", "percent_equal" },
    33	  { "Void", "void" },
    34	  { "Char", "char" },
    35	  { "If", "if" },
    36	  { "Else", "else" },
    37	  { "While", "while" },
    38	  { "For", "for" },
    39	  { "Break", "break" },
    40	  { "Continue", "continue" },
    41	  { "Switch", "switch" },
    42	  { "Case", "case" },
    43	  { "Default", "default" },
    44	  { "Semi", "semi" },
    45	  { "Comma", "comma" },
    46	  { "Dot", "dot" },
    47	  { "Colon", "colon" },
    48	  { "Equal", "equal" },
    49	  { "NotEqual", "not_equal" },
    50	  { "Less", "less" },
    51	  { "LessEqual", "less_equal" },
    52	  { "Greater", "greater" },
    53	  { "GreaterEqual", "greater_equal" },
    54	  { "LogicalAnd", "and_and" },
    55	  { "LogicalOr", "or_or" },
    56	  { "LogicalNot", "exclamation" },
    57	  { "BitwiseAnd", "ampersand" },
    58	  { "BitwiseOr", "pipe" },
    59	  { "BitwiseXor", "caret" },
    60	  { "BitwiseNot", "tilde" },
    61	  { "LeftShift", "less_less" },
    62	  { "RightShift", "greater_greater" },
    63	  { "Increment", "plus_plus" },
    64	  { "Decrement", "minus_minus" },
    65	  { "StringLiteral", "string_literal" },
    66	  { "CharacterLiteral", "character_literal" },
    67	
    68	  // 在这里继续添加其他映射
    69	};
    70	
    71	void
    72	print_token(const antlr4::Token* token,
    73	            const antlr4::CommonTokenStream& tokens,
    74	            std::ofstream& outFile,
    75	            const antlr4::Lexer& lexer)
    76	{
    77	  auto& vocabulary = lexer.getVocabulary();
    78	
    79	  auto tokenTypeName =
    80	    std::string(vocabulary.getSymbolicName(token->getType()));
    81	
    82	  if (tokenTypeName.empty())
    83	    tokenTypeName = "<UNKNOWN>"; // 处理可能的空字符串情况
    84	
    85	  if (tokenTypeMapping.find(tokenTypeName) != tokenTypeMapping.end()) {
    86	    tokenTypeName = tokenTypeMapping[tokenTypeName];
    87	  }
    88	
    89	  // 获取文件名和位置信息
    90	  // 从 token 中获取行号和列号
    91	  int line = token->getLine();
    92	  int col = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1;
    93	  
    94	  // 为了简化，我们使用固定的文件名，实际项目中应该从输入文件中获取
    95	  std::string fileName = "<stdin>"; // 默认值，实际应从输入文件中获取
    96	  
    97	  // 从测试用例中观察，应该是从输入文件路径中提取
    98	  // 但这里我们暂时使用一个通用格式
    99	  std::string locInfo = " Loc=<" + fileName + ":" + std::to_string(line) + ":" + std::to_string(col) + ">";
   100	
   101	  // 检查是否是行首
   102	  bool startOfLine = (token->getCharPositionInLine() == 0);
   103	  
   104	  // 检查是否有前导空格（需要更复杂的逻辑来确定）
   105	  bool leadingSpace = false;
   106	  // 简化处理：如果token前有空白字符，则标记为leading space
   107	  // 但这个需要更精确的逻辑，这里先简单处理
   108	  if (token->getCharPositionInLine() > 0) {
   109	    // 如果不是行首，且前面有字符，可能是有前导空格
   110	    // 但更准确的方法是检查token前后字符
   111	    // 为了简化，我们假设当token不是行首时，可能有前导空格
   112	    leadingSpace = true;
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  if (token->getText() != "<EOF>")
   116	    outFile << tokenTypeName << " '" << token->getText() << "'";
   117	  else
   118	    outFile << tokenTypeName << " '"
   119	            << "'";
   120	  if (startOfLine)
   121	    outFile << "\t [StartOfLine]";
   122	  if (leadingSpace)
   123	    outFile << " [LeadingSpace]";
   124	  outFile << locInfo << std::endl;
   125	}
   126	
   127	int
   128	main(int argc, char* argv[])
   129	{
   130
